name: OpenPPT
desc: AIPPT Online editor，Base On ChatPPT， supports document editing services throughout the entire process, including import, export, layout beautification, online …
descFull: AIPPT Online editor，Base On ChatPPT， supports document editing services throughout the entire process, including import, export, layout beautification, online editing, playback, and presentation animation. It can quickly integrate into your products or internal systems of the enterprise.AIPPT在线编辑器，基于ChatPPT，支持整个过程的文档编辑服务，包括导入、导出、布局美化、在线编辑、播放和演示动画。
